title: soul.json manifest schema
description: Boot-time and inspection surface for a Harkonnen agent's Calvin Archive continuity state. Generated by project_soul_package() and verified by verify_soul_package_integrity(). This manifest is a projection — canonical truth lives in the Calvin Archive. When the manifest and archive diverge, the archive wins.

schema_version.description: Version of the soul.json schema itself. Increment when fields are added or semantics change.

agent.description: Machine identifier for the agent. Matches the agent name in AGENTS.md and the Calvin Archive soul entity.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this manifest was last projected from the Calvin Archive.

generated_from.description: Reference to the canonical Calvin Archive state this manifest was projected from. Used to detect drift between the manifest and the archive.

continuity_snapshot_id.description: ID of the continuity_snapshot entity in the Calvin Archive TypeDB graph that this manifest was projected from.

archive_schema_version.description: Calvin Archive TypeDB schema version at projection time.

run_id.description: Run ID that triggered this projection, if any.

identity.description: Identity kernel references and version anchors. Changes here require a slow-loop integration-policy review.

kernel_version.description: Version of the Labrador baseline kernel (labrador.md) this agent was initialized against.

labrador_invariants_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of factory/agents/personality/labrador.md at projection time. Used to detect if the kernel file was modified after the archive was built.

ethos_version.description: Version tag of the agent's Ethos chamber state at projection time. Incremented on any kernel-level revision.

behavioral_contract_version.description: Version of the per-agent behavioral contract YAML (factory/agents/contracts/<agent>.yaml).

last_kernel_verification.description: Timestamp of the last successful assert_kernel_preservation() run.

kernel_intact.description: Result of the most recent assert_kernel_preservation() check. null if never run.

chambers.description: Per-chamber state summary. Each chamber hash is a deterministic fingerprint of the chamber's canonical TypeDB entity set at projection time.

package_files.description: List of files in the soul package with their SHA-256 hashes at projection time. Used to detect silent drift between the projected files and the archive.

thresholds.description: Metric thresholds and policy configuration. These gate the Meta-Governor's accept/reject/quarantine decisions. Changes require slow-loop review.

drift_bound_alpha.description: Behavioral deviation rate threshold (α in D* = α/γ). Meta-Governor fires when observed deviation rate exceeds this.

drift_bound_gamma.description: Recovery rate floor (γ in D* = α/γ). System is considered at risk if recovery rate drops below this between consolidation cycles.

ssa_floor.description: Minimum acceptable Semantic Soul Alignment score per run window. Runs below this floor are flagged.

hysteresis_tolerance.description: Maximum acceptable cross-layer hysteresis (H) after a rollback. If H exceeds this, the system is not considered restored.

quarantine_rate_ceiling.description: Maximum fraction of integration candidates that should be quarantined per reflection cycle. Pathological quarantine accumulation is flagged above this rate.

phi_drop_quarantine_trigger.description: If Φ (integrated information) drops by more than this fraction after a learning event, the candidate is quarantined rather than integrated. Null if Φ computation is not enabled.

pathos_propagation_threshold.description: Minimum Pathos salience score for an experience to propagate from Pathos into Ethos. Experiences below this threshold inform priors without reaching the identity layer. Null until Pathos propagation mechanism is specified (P8-P3).

continuity.description: Current continuity health snapshot at projection time.

drift_d_star.description: Most recent D* value (α/γ). Null if the Materialize view is not yet live.

ssa_last.description: SSA score from the most recent run window. Null if not yet computed.

quarantine_count.description: Number of currently open quarantine entries.

open_arc_count.description: Number of open narrative/epistemic arcs — unresolved tensions that are being actively tracked.

stress_estimate.description: S(T) stress estimator value from the TimescaleDB window. Null if TimescaleDB is not live.

last_slow_loop_revision.description: Timestamp of the most recent slow-loop integration-policy revision with human endorsement.

integration_policies_version.description: Version tag of the current set of integration policies. Incremented on each slow-loop revision.

runs_since_last_reflection.description: Number of runs since the last medium-loop schema revision. Used to trigger reflection cycles.

provider_lineage.description: Ordered record of model/provider swaps. Presence continuity checks are run after each entry is appended. An empty array means the agent has operated on one provider since initialization.

compatibility.description: Version compatibility constraints. If the running Calvin Archive schema falls outside these bounds, the soul package should be re-projected before use.

min_archive_schema_version.description: Minimum Calvin Archive TypeDB schema version this manifest is compatible with.

max_archive_schema_version.description: Maximum compatible archive schema version. Null means no upper bound declared.

min_labrador_kernel_version.description: Minimum Labrador kernel version this agent's Ethos chamber was initialized against.

min_soul_json_schema_version.description: Minimum soul.json schema version a reader must support to interpret this manifest.

verification.description: Integrity verification state. Set by verify_soul_package_integrity().

status.description: clean: package files match archive projection. drifted: at least one file hash or chamber hash diverges from archive. unverified: integrity has not been checked since last projection. archive_unavailable: verification was attempted but TypeDB was unreachable.

last_verified_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent successful verify_soul_package_integrity() run.

manifest_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of this soul.json file's content (excluding this field). Used to detect post-projection tampering.

drifted_files.description: Paths of package files whose current hash differs from the hash recorded at projection time. Empty when status=clean.

drifted_chambers.description: Chamber names whose hash differs from the archive at last verification. Empty when status=clean.

entry_count.description: Number of canonical entities in this chamber at projection time.

hash.description: Deterministic SHA-256 fingerprint of the chamber's canonical TypeDB entity set at projection time. Used by verify_soul_package_integrity() to detect drift.

last_updated.description: Timestamp of the most recent write to this chamber.

open_quarantine_count.description: Number of quarantine entries currently open in this chamber. Present for chambers that can hold quarantine entries (Episteme, Ethos).

path.description: Path relative to the Harkonnen repo root.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the file content at projection time.

purpose.description: One-line description of this file's role in the soul package.

model_id.description: Model identifier as it appears in the run config.

swapped_at.description: Timestamp when this provider/model became the active configuration.

continuity_check_passed.description: Whether the soul continuity check run after this swap confirmed identity preservation. Null if the check has not been run.

snapshot_id_at_swap.description: Continuity snapshot ID captured immediately before the swap. Enables comparison against post-swap behavior.
